rationale: API ergonomics improvement to wrap BulkWriteResult in BulkWriteError type; no spec rule violated.
User-reported connection timeout with ReferenceError in pool.js; support question, no spec rule contradicted.
Promise wrapper checks 'err && r == null' so errors are silently resolved; internal API bug, not a spec violation.
ignoreUndefined option missing from unordered.js but present in ordered.js; internal inconsistency, not a spec rule.
Process crash on unsupported maxIdleTimeMS param; Improvement to handle gracefully, not a specific spec rule violation.
close event not raised for replica sets; feature request for consistent unavailability detection, no spec rule named.
Internal refactor: delete local js-bson copy and expose EJSON API; no driver behavior or spec change.
Improvement to implement newly approved extjson v2.0.0 spec; proactive spec rollout, driver was not wrong under prior spec.
Missing require('util').format import in authenticate.js causes runtime ReferenceError; internal code bug.
Listener leak at connection.js:467 after .close(); resource management bug, no spec rule involved.
APM rebuilds server responses from scratch, dropping $clusterTime; framed as brittleness improvement, not a spec violation.
Improvement to add comment parameter to aggregate; feature addition depending on DRIVERS-377, not fixing wrong behavior.
User's Travis CI test fails; resolution Done (not Fixed), user environment issue not a driver bug.
Documentation update changing example KDC domain; no driver behavior change.
Completing change stream implementation pending full server support; Improvement for feature completion, not a conformance fix.
Internal refactor to unify two divergent ReadPreference implementations; no spec behavior change.
Cleanup of find parameter handling to support only find(query, options, callback); API refactor, no spec rule.
findOne does not handle undefined as third argument properly; API argument validation bug, no spec rule named.
listCollections ignores readPreference=secondaryPreferred from connection string; server-selection spec requires honoring read preference.
Changelog documentation update for breaking change; no driver behavior involved.
User question about $elemMatch behavior with indexes; resolution Done, likely a server/user issue, not driver bug.
Reference guide documentation update for 3.0.0; no driver behavior change.
Improvement to align keepAlive options with Node.js socket API; no spec rule involved.
Mongos topology leaks serverDescriptionChanged event listener on reconnect; resource management bug, not a spec rule violation.
Documentation addition explaining JS vs C++ BSON parser differences; no driver behavior change.
Find.updateOne returns wrong type (FindOperatorsUnordered vs UnorderedBulkOp); API return-type bug, not a spec rule.
Sharded test suite failures against 3.4; test environment issue, no spec behavior described.
Driver hangs indefinitely with FQDN hostnames and Secondary read preference; performance/hang bug, no specific spec rule violated.
API documentation cleanup for 3.0.0; no driver behavior change.
MongoClient.connect performance regression on Windows in 3.0; resolution Done, performance issue not a spec violation.
Installation guide documentation fix to specify version in npm install command; no driver behavior.
Extract and merge mock server into shared module; internal tooling refactor, no spec behavior.
Change stream update operations not triggered when resuming; resolution Done (not Fixed), likely user environment issue.
Incorrect require syntax in collection.js breaks webpack build; build compatibility bug, no spec involvement.
Documentation fix for MongoClient.connect default family (IPv6 to IPv4 fallback); no behavior change.
Documentation bug in aggregation tutorial showing cursor object instead of enumerating it; docs fix only.
Docs version selector links to Java driver instead of Node.js driver; documentation bug only.
Documentation incorrectly says aggregate callback returns object instead of Cursor; docs fix only.
MaxListenersExceededWarning with 10+ databases due to per-db event listener registration; internal resource management bug.
mongodb+srv:// connection strings broken against 3.6.1 servers; DNS seedlist spec requires this to work; Resolution Fixed.
Migration guide documentation update for aggregate pipeline array-only change; docs only.
Documentation for .watch() fullDocument lists 'none'/'lookup' instead of correct 'updateLookup'; docs bug only.
promoteBuffers option causes GridFS to call .length() as function on Buffer; internal type-handling incompatibility, no spec rule.
Move connection string parser from native to mongodb-core; internal refactor, no spec behavior change.
db.collection catches application errors and calls callback twice; internal error handling bug, no spec rule.
collection.remove throws 'Cannot convert undefined or null to object'; internal null-handling bug, no spec rule.
Implicit session not released when executeOperation throws synchronously; resource management bug rather than spec behavioral violation.
startSession documented as returning Promise but returns ClientSession; documentation inconsistency, resolution Done.
Topology not sending endSessions for all ServerSessions on close; sessions spec requires drivers to endSessions when MongoClient closes.
Driver 3.x find().toArray() ~4x slower than 2.x against Atlas; performance regression, no spec rule involved.
